sellers_note: This 2021 Ford F-150 XLT in blue represents a capable truck engineered for both work and daily driving, offering the reliability and functionality trucks are built to deliver.- 3.5L V6 EcoBoost engine with 10-speed automatic transmission and 4WD- Max Trailer Tow Package with integrated trailer brake controller and pro trailer backup assist- Equipment Group 302A High with class IV trailer hitch receiver and chrome appearance upgrades- SYNC 4 with 12'' touchscreen, Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and connected navigation- Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist 2.0 with intelligent adaptive cruise control, evasive steering assist, and lane centering- Twin panel moonroof for added cabin brightness and ventilation- Extended range 36-gallon fuel tank for extended driving range- 360-degree camera system with trailer reverse guidance- Power-sliding rear window for convenient bed access- 10-way power driver and passenger seats with leather-wrapped steering wheel- Dual zone automatic temperature control- LED box lighting with zone lighting throughout the bed- Tailgate step with integrated work surface- XLT Sport Appearance Package with body-color bumpers and unique interior finishes- Power-adjustable pedals and intelligent access with push button startThis truck combines practical capability with modern convenience features. The 3.5L EcoBoost engine delivers strong performance while the max towing package supports substantial hauling demands. The advanced driver assistance systems, including intelligent adaptive cruise control and evasive steering assist, enhance confidence on every journey. Interior features like the work surface, 360-degree camera, and pro trailer backup assist make everyday tasks more manageable, whether you're managing a job site or heading out for weekend adventures.The thoughtful design extends throughout the cabin with SYNC 4 connectivity keeping you linked to your digital life, while the spacious bed accommodates whatever your day requires. The twin panel moonroof adds an open, airy feel when desired, and the extended fuel tank reduces fill-up frequency on longer trips.With 102,947 miles, this F-150 XLT has been maintained and remains fully capable of handling the demands ahead. The combination of capability, modern technology, and practical features makes this truck a solid choice for buyers seeking a well-equipped work vehicle that doesn't compromise on comfort or convenience.We invite you to visit our showroom to experience this F-150 XLT firsthand. You have found the right car, at the right dealership, and definitely at the right PRICE!! Don't wat, call right now before it's too late!
